schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

schemas.name: Pvt Ltd Registration — ₹8,999 | Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: Private limited company registration online. ₹8,999 all-inclusive. DSC, DIN, name approval, SPICe+, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. 5-15 working days. Post-incorporation compliance by CA firm.

schemas.name: Private Limited Company Registration
schemas.description: Private limited company registration online. ₹8,999 all-inclusive. DSC, DIN, name approval, SPICe+, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. 5-15 working days. Post-incorporation compliance by CA firm.

schemas.name: Private Limited Company Registration
schemas.description: Step-by-step process for private limited company registration in India.

step.name: Obtain DSC
step.text: Digital Signature Certificate for all directors. Same-day with Aadhaar e-KYC.

step.name: Reserve Name
step.text: Submit 2 names via SPICe+ Part A. Approval in 1-2 days.

step.name: File SPICe+ (INC-32)
step.text: Integrated form with director details, capital structure, registered office.

step.name: MOA & AOA
step.text: Memorandum and Articles of Association filed electronically.

step.name: Certificate of Incorporation
step.text: MCA issues COI with CIN. Company is legally incorporated.

step.name: Post-Incorporation
step.text: INC-20A within 180 days. Auditor appointment within 30 days.

mainEntity.name: How much does Pvt Ltd registration cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: All-inclusive from ₹8,999 covering government fees, DSC for 2 directors, DIN, name approval, SPICe+ filing, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. No hidden charges. Stamp duty included.

mainEntity.name: How many days does registration take?

acceptedAnswer.text: 5-15 working days from document submission. Depends on MCA processing time and name availability. Express processing not available (MCA timelines are government-controlled).
Yes. Foreign nationals can be directors. At least 1 must be Indian resident (182+ days in India). Foreign directors need DSC, DIN, passport, and apostilled address proof.

mainEntity.name: What compliance is needed after registration?

acceptedAnswer.text: INC-20A (commencement) within 180 days, auditor appointment within 30 days, annual ROC filings (AOC-4, MGT-7), minimum 4 board meetings/year, AGM within 6 months of year-end, and ongoing tax compliance (ITR, TDS, GST if applicable).

mainEntity.name: Why register through a CA firm instead of an aggregator?

acceptedAnswer.text: ClearTax and Vakilsearch register and disappear. Virtual Auditor continues: annual compliance, statutory audit, tax planning, FEMA/FDI compliance when you raise funding, and share valuation by IBBI Registered Valuer. One firm for the entire lifecycle.

mainEntity.name: Can I convert my proprietorship/partnership to Pvt Ltd?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Proprietorship to Pvt Ltd: incorporate new company, transfer assets/liabilities. Partnership to Pvt Ltd: Section 366 of Companies Act (conversion route). LLP to Pvt Ltd: also under Section 366. We handle all conversion types.
